description_long: This is a short wooden picket fence section composed of four vertical planks with pointed tops, arranged in a slightly irregular, staggered pattern. The planks are connected by a single diagonal rail, which is fastened with two visible round bolts or rivets. The wood has a medium brown finish with a visible grain texture, giving it a rustic and natural appearance. The fence is compact and appears lightweight, suitable for decorative or low-security purposes in urban gardens, parks, or residential yards. There are no visible decorative embellishments beyond the pointed tops and the diagonal rail. The overall construction suggests it is a movable segment rather than a fixed installation.
description: A small, rustic wooden picket fence section with four pointed planks and a single diagonal rail, finished in medium brown wood grain. The design is simple and functional, with visible bolts securing the rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing four pointed wooden planks, a diagonal rail with two bolts, and the staggered arrangement of the planks.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the overlapping arrangement of the planks and rail.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the pointed planks and diagonal rail with bolts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the layered construction of the planks and rail.
